March 05, 2024 v1.1.5

10x Faster: Major Performance Improvements for Bulk Editing

Major performance update makes bulk editing up to 10x faster for large design systems. Updating 500 tokens now takes ~2 seconds instead of ~10 seconds with optimized variable updates, smarter re-rendering, and faster JSON imports.
Read full article
March 01, 2024 v1.0.0

Version 1.0.0 Released

We’re excited to announce version 1.0.0 of Winden Tokens!
